description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a manicured hedge and featuring a flat roof with multiple skylights. The front facade is lined with large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoors. The property includes a paved driveway, a small front lawn with decorative shrubs, and a backyard with a spacious patio, outdoor seating, and a rectangular swimming pool. The rear and side boundaries are lined with tall trees and hedges, offering privacy and greenery. The exterior walls are clad in light wood and neutral-toned panels, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout is elongated and rectangular, maximizing the use of space and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, driveway, and manicured front lawn with hedges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, backyard lawn, patio area, and swimming pool.
description_view_2: Rear view with tall trees, privacy hedges, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and the length of the building with adjacent green space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
